Continue to March 1, 2019; Defendants can file a brief of no more than ten concise pages by February 22, 2019; plaintiffs response limited to ten pages filed on February 26, 2019.

The Court will prepare an order. Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600 email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)

payments.description: REQ OR STIP AND ORDER W/O HEARING
